sr.title: Ekonomija i standard
sr.lead: Veće plate, održive javne finansije i razvoj koji se vidi u svakodnevnom životu.
points: rast zarada kroz produktivnost i investicije
podrška preduzetništvu i novim radnim mjestima

en.title: Economy and living standards
en.lead: Higher wages, sustainable public finances and development visible in everyday life.
points: wage growth through productivity and investment
support for entrepreneurship and new jobs

sr.title: Evropska integracija
sr.lead: Punopravno članstvo u Evropskoj uniji kao strateški državni cilj.
points: institucije koje rade po evropskim standardima

en.title: European integration
en.lead: Full membership in the European Union as a strategic national goal.

sr.title: Mladi i obrazovanje
sr.lead: Obrazovni sistem koji daje znanje, vještine i razlog da mladi ostanu u Crnoj Gori.

en.title: Youth and education
en.lead: An education system that provides knowledge, skills and a reason for young people to stay in Montenegro.
points: connecting education and the labor market
support for talent and student initiatives

sr.title: Zdravstvo i socijalna sigurnost
sr.lead: Dostupnije usluge, sigurnije penzije i sistem koji štiti najugroženije.

en.title: Healthcare and social security
en.lead: More accessible services, safer pensions and a system that protects the most vulnerable.
